hero.text: Julie J. Greene creates books, guided journals, and healing experiences for people navigating grief, emotional growth, and life after loss.

statement.title: Not just resilient. Transformational.
statement.text: Reflections, healing, hope, and a journey back to you.

about.title: Julie J. Greene, MSW, LCSW-C, EQPC
about.lead: Julie J. Greene is an Author, Emotional Intelligence Practitioner, Mental Wellness and Resilience Strategist, Educator, and Founder & CEO of Transformative Healing & Wellness, LLC.
paragraphs: With more than three decades of experience in behavioral health, leadership development, higher education, and community wellness, she is passionate about helping individuals and organizations navigate life's challenges with purpose, resilience, and intention.

Through her writing, speaking engagements, workshops, and training programs, Julie empowers others to move beyond surviving and toward thriving by cultivating emotional wellness, resilience, and intentional living.

Whether speaking from a stage, facilitating a workshop, coaching professionals, or writing from her own lived experiences, Julie inspires others to reclaim their power, strengthen their resilience, and author lives filled with purpose, meaning, and possibility.

highlights.label: Author Of
highlights.text: HerContinuum™, Intentionally Living Beyond Grief, and the Intentionally Living Beyond Grief Companion Workbook.

highlights.label: Education & Leadership
highlights.text: Adjunct Professor and Practicum Liaison at Morgan State University School of Social Work, helping prepare future social work professionals.

about.missionQuote: Life's most difficult experiences can become catalysts for transformation when we choose to heal, grow, and live intentionally.
about.missionStatement: Julie’s mission is to help people move from surviving to thriving — one intentional choice at a time.

speaking.title: Bring emotional intelligence, resilience, and intentional living to your audience.
speaking.text: Julie speaks to organizations, universities, conferences, faith communities, women’s groups, leadership teams, and wellness audiences seeking meaningful conversations about healing, emotional resilience, and transformation.
speaking.imageAlt: Julie J. Greene speaking and book promotion

services.title: Speaking & Keynotes
services.description: Powerful talks on grief, resilience, emotional intelligence, intentional living, and healing-centered transformation.

services.title: EQ & Resilience Training
services.description: Training experiences that help leaders, teams, and communities strengthen emotional intelligence and navigate challenges with clarity.

services.title: Guided Healing Workshops
services.description: Reflective group experiences designed to support healing, growth, self-awareness, and purposeful forward movement.

speaking.ctaText: Invite Julie to speak, facilitate a workshop, or design a healing-centered experience for your organization.

booksSection.title: Books and guided journals for grief support, healing, and intentional living.
booksSection.text: Julie J. Greene’s books help readers honor loss, process grief, reflect with intention, and rediscover meaning after life changes, mother loss, relationships ending, career transitions, and other deeply personal forms of grief.

books.title: HerContinuum™
books.subtitle: A Reflection Journal for Motherless Daughters
books.description: A guided reflection journal for motherless daughters learning to live with both love and loss. Through intentional prompts and space to remember, release, and reflect, HerContinuum™ helps readers honor a mother’s influence while recognizing the strength that continues within them.
books.imageAlt: HerContinuum reflection journal for motherless daughters by Julie J. Greene

books.title: Intentionally Living Beyond Grief
books.subtitle: 365 Days of Healing, Becoming & Intentional Living
books.description: A compassionate 365-day grief support guide for honoring loss, healing through reflection, and rising beyond grief with intention. This book supports readers navigating death, relationship loss, career loss, major transitions, and the realization that life has changed.
books.imageAlt: Intentionally Living Beyond Grief 365 days of healing and intentional living book by Julie J. Greene

books.title: Intentionally Living Beyond Grief Companion Workbook
books.subtitle: A Guided Journey Toward Healing, Growth, and Intentional Living
books.description: A companion workbook with guided reflections, exercises, and healing-centered activities that help readers process grief, rediscover purpose, and move forward with clarity, resilience, and intentional living practices.
books.imageAlt: Intentionally Living Beyond Grief Companion Workbook with guided grief reflection exercises by Julie J. Greene

testimonialsSection.title: Words from readers and reviewers.
testimonialsSection.text: Julie’s writing and teaching create space for honest reflection, healing, and meaningful transformation.

testimonials.quote: Julie’s work meets readers with compassion, honesty, and hope. Her words create space for grief while gently guiding people toward healing, resilience, and intentional living.
testimonials.name: Editor Testimonial

newsletter.title: Stay connected for book updates, events, reflections, and speaking opportunities.

faq.title: Common questions about Julie’s books, speaking, and grief wellness work.
faq.text: Quick answers for event planners, readers, organizations, and people looking for grief support resources.

items.question: Does Julie J. Greene speak at events?
items.answer: Yes. Julie J. Greene speaks at conferences, universities, organizations, faith communities, women’s groups, wellness events, and leadership gatherings. Her speaking work focuses on grief, resilience, emotional wellness, emotional intelligence, healing, and intentional living.

items.question: What topics does Julie speak about?
items.answer: Julie speaks about grief support, resilience, emotional intelligence, mental wellness, intentional living, healing after loss, leadership wellness, and transformation through difficult life experiences.

items.question: What books has Julie J. Greene written?
items.answer: Julie J. Greene is the author of HerContinuum™, Intentionally Living Beyond Grief, and the Intentionally Living Beyond Grief Companion Workbook. These resources support reflection, healing, grief processing, emotional growth, and intentional living.

items.question: Are Julie’s books for grief support?
items.answer: Yes. Julie’s books and guided journals are designed for grief support, especially for readers navigating loss, identity shifts, healing, emotional wellness, and life after grief. They offer reflective prompts, compassionate language, and practical encouragement for moving forward with intention.

items.question: How do I request Julie for a workshop or keynote?
items.answer: To request Julie J. Greene for a workshop, keynote, training, interview, or healing-centered event, use the contact form and select the reason that best matches your request. Include the event date, location, audience size, and goals for the session.

contact.title: Start the conversation about books, speaking, or partnership.
contact.text: Use the form to request a speaking engagement, ask about Julie’s books and workbooks, discuss bulk orders, or explore a healing-centered collaboration.
